hero.pre: Strategy that knows what to build.
hero.post: that knows how to build it.
hero.lead: OTR Consulting is a strategy and AI implementation practice. We partner with organizations of every size and sector, guiding each engagement end-to-end - from market research, sector mapping, and go-to-market strategy, through building the tailored AI system itself, to ongoing maintenance once it's live. There is no fixed menu: every engagement begins with your specific situation, and the right solution follows from it.
hero.micro: Free of charge - just a conversation about your business.

paths.heading: Two starting points we see most often.
paths.sub: These aren't fixed packages - they're examples of how conversations usually begin. Whichever describes you, the outcome is the same: a solution scoped to what you actually need.

colA.label: Example A
colA.title: You know what you need
colA.sub: A few examples of what this has looked like:

items.title: Lead Generation Systems
items.desc: Automated pipelines that find, qualify, and route the right prospects - so your team spends time closing, not searching.

items.title: CRM Integrations
items.desc: Connect your CRM to the tools you actually use, so data moves on its own and nothing falls through the cracks.

items.title: Chatbots & Support Agents
items.desc: AI-driven conversations that handle inquiries, bookings, and support around the clock - trained on how your business actually talks.

items.title: Custom Workflow Agents
items.desc: Purpose-built AI agents for the specific, repetitive process eating your team's time - designed around your workflow, not a template.

colB.label: Example B
colB.title: You know the problem, not the tech
colB.sub: A few examples of what this has looked like:

items.title: Grow Sales
items.desc: Turn more of your existing traffic and leads into revenue - without adding headcount.

items.title: Lower Response Times
items.desc: Answer customers and prospects faster, at any hour, without anyone standing by to do it manually.

items.title: Reduce Manual Work
items.desc: Get the repetitive, low-value tasks off your team's plate - and onto a system that doesn't get tired of them.

items.title: Make Faster, Better-Informed Decisions
items.desc: Get clearer, faster analysis so you can act on opportunities before they pass - without hiring an analyst team.

paths.footnote: These are illustrative - not a catalog. If what you need isn't listed here, it's probably still something we can help with.

consulting.text: Need the strategy work on its own? We also run market research, GTM strategy, and business planning
consulting.strong: - as a standalone engagement, or as the first step before we build anything.

how.heading: One process, from either entry point.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We map your actual workflow and constraints - not a generic questionnaire.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: We design and build the system against your specific process and data.

steps.title: Ship
steps.desc: Live in your business, tested against real cases before full rollout.

steps.title: Maintain
steps.desc: Ongoing support as your business - and the system - keeps evolving.

about.lead: Our background is in strategy consulting - the kind of work that means figuring out where a business should place its bets before recommending anything. We've paired that with hands-on AI and automation expertise, so the same team that maps out the strategy is the one that builds it. Most consultants can't build what they recommend. Most AI builders don't know what's worth building in the first place. We do both.

clients.heading: Clients we've worked with
clients.sub: Our work spans a wide range of client types - the approach adapts, the process doesn't.

finalCta.heading: Not sure where to start? A short call is usually enough to know.
finalCta.micro: Free of charge - just a conversation about your business.

modal.title: Tell us about your business
modal.sub: A few details, and we'll be in touch to set up a time to talk.
modal.name: Name
modal.message: What are you looking to do?
modal.messagePh: A sentence or two is plenty.
modal.successBody: We'll get back to you within one business day to find a time to talk.
